scripts.clean:next-dev: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.next/dev', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 5, retryDelay: 100 })"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.next/dev', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 5, retryDelay: 100 })"
scripts.pretypecheck: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.next/dev', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 5, retryDelay: 100 })"
